scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,worker,web -c blue,green,yellow "cd apps/api && uvicorn app.main:app --reload" "cd apps/api && python3 -m celery -A app.tasks.celery_app.celery_app worker -l info" "cd apps/web && pnpm dev"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n infra,api,worker,web -c red,blue,green,yellow "docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml up redis minio minio-setup" "cd apps/api && uvicorn app.main:app --reload" "cd apps/api && python3 -m celery -A app.tasks.celery_app.celery_app worker -l info" "cd apps/web && pnpm dev"
